summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SMTP email notification feature for Hosting hospitality website - all functionality working perfectly
passed_tests: Admin login with admin@hosting.com / Hosting@2026
Email Settings tab appears in admin dashboard tabs
SMTP Configuration form loads with all fields (host, port, username, password, from_email, from_name, to_email)
SMTP form shows previously saved settings (smtp.gmail.com, port 587, etc)
Enable/Disable toggle for email notifications works correctly
Booking Alerts and Inquiry Alerts checkboxes function properly
Use TLS checkbox works correctly
Save Settings button saves SMTP config via POST /api/admin/smtp
Send Test Email button calls POST /api/admin/smtp/test (returns expected error with test SMTP)
Recent Email Logs panel shows on the right side with 4 log entries
Backend API: GET /api/admin/smtp returns config with masked password
Backend API: POST /api/admin/smtp saves config successfully
Backend API: POST /api/admin/smtp/test returns expected error for invalid SMTP credentials
Backend API: GET /api/admin/email-logs returns logs correctly
Backend API: POST /api/bookings triggers email notification attempt (logged in email_logs)
Backend API: POST /api/contact triggers email notification attempt (logged in email_logs)
Unauthorized access to SMTP endpoints returns 401
Landing page at / loads correctly with 2 property cards
Properties tab still works in admin panel
Booking form on landing page opens and functions correctly
Contact form on landing page works with proper validation
SMTP toggle functionality (Enabled/Disabled states)
All SMTP form fields are editable and functional
Email logs update correctly when notifications are triggered
Admin dashboard stats show correct data (Properties: 2, Bookings: 6, Inquiries: 5, Revenue: ₹17,500)

success_percentage.backend: 100% (36/36 API tests passed including 12 new SMTP tests)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (25/25 UI tests passed including 10 new Email Settings tests)
success_percentage.integration: 100% (SMTP email notifications fully integrated - booking and contact forms trigger email attempts)
